code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()

  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true

  while i < n
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(s)
      s
    when None
      ""
    end

    let val = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end

    sum = sum + val

    if first
      out = "#{sum}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sum}"
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
